composite_description: No drawdown signal. Conditions do not meet any entry threshold.
brief:
NO ACTION. Signal state is BEAR phase with no drawdown extremity. BTC z-score of -0.58 is well above the -3.0 crisis threshold required for entry in bear markets. Structural risk filter is active: BTC trades 50.6% below its 1yr high (threshold -35%), and 30d realised volatility at 33% is below the 40% minimum. Without a structural break in volatility or a severe drawdown, there is no reliable edge. Backtest shows BEAR phases without crisis signals average -6.2% at 120 days.

The binding constraints are realised volatility (33% vs 40% threshold) and the distance to the 1yr high. BTC sits 21.2% below its 200d MA in confirmed bear conditions. Fear & Greed at 12 signals extreme sentiment, but this is context only and does not override the absence of a technical entry signal. Hold cash. Monitor for z-score < -3.0 or volatility expansion above 40% as potential crisis entry conditions.
